activities.name: Name Tag
activities.summary: Tag where freezing players are freed by a teammate who says their name.

activities.name: High Five Tag
activities.summary: Dribbling tag — frozen players freed with a high five under control.

activities.name: Double Tag
activities.summary: Tag where frozen players need two different teammates to free them.

activities.name: Captain's Tag
activities.summary: Three-team tag with rotating captains who lead tactics and team talks.

activities.name: The Number Call Game
activities.summary: Coach calls a number, children form groups of that size — building inclusion.

activities.name: Gate Passing
activities.summary: Pairs build a high score by passing the ball back and forth through cone gates.

activities.name: Brave on the Ball
activities.summary: Dribble through gates against passive defenders — react positively to losing the ball.

activities.name: 1v1 Duals
activities.summary: 1v1 matches in tunnels with promotion and relegation — handshake after every game.

activities.name: Mario Kart
activities.summary: Themed dribbling obstacle course with banana skins, shells and Venus fly traps.

activities.name: Bib Toss
activities.summary: Bibs swap on the move — on 'Bib Toss!' children race to the matching colour corner.

activities.name: Goal Hunters
activities.summary: Players dribble to score in a goal; 'goal hunters' tackle and try to steal.

activities.name: Ball Raiders
activities.summary: Two teams — one defends footballs, the other tackles and passes to the coach.

activities.name: Where's Wally?
activities.summary: Hide-and-seek dribbling pairs — Wally evades the seeker after a toe-tap count.

activities.name: Pass the Cone
activities.summary: Pairs swap coloured cones; on coach's call, react and race or tag.

activities.name: Piggy in the Middle
activities.summary: 3-v-1 possession with role-swap when the defender wins it.

activities.name: Popcorn
activities.summary: Bounce the ball on upside-down cones to flip them — 'pop the corn'.

activities.name: Positive Pairs
activities.summary: Pair ball mastery with encouragement habits — beat your own score.

activities.name: Positivity Tag
activities.summary: Tag → pass the bib → spread positivity. Awareness, control, names.

activities.name: Power Surge
activities.summary: Colour-call dribble to one of four corner Power Stations, sole-stop, explode back.

activities.name: Risky Business
activities.summary: Choose your risk through guarded zones — 1, 2 or 3 points (double with weaker foot).

activities.name: Robin Hood
activities.summary: 4 teams race to collect footballs from the centre pile and dribble them home.

activities.name: Selfie Tag
activities.summary: Tag-with-rescue: take a selfie with the orange-cone phone to free a teammate.

activities.name: Ultimate Tag
activities.summary: Self-refereed everyone-tags. Take a knee when tagged, re-enter when your tagger goes out.

activities.name: Volcanoes & Craters
activities.summary: Two teams flip cones — Volcanoes upright, Craters upside-down. 'Freeze' to count.

activities.name: Knights, Castles and Dragons
activities.summary: Narrative-led: knights travel between four castles, dragons inside try to tag them. Progresses from pure tag to dribbling.

activities.name: England & Scotland
activities.summary: React to the coach's call and race to safety before opponents can tag you.

activities.name: Three Lions / Lionesses
activities.summary: Three defenders hunt for footballs whilst attackers dribble and try to score after winning possession.

activities.name: Tuchel Says
activities.summary: Football version of Simon Says using ball mastery challenges, listening skills and concentration.

activities.name: Team Tag
activities.summary: Three teams compete in a tag game where players avoid taggers, complete challenges and work together.

activities.name: Quick Maths
activities.summary: Players solve maths questions whilst moving with a football and quickly organise themselves into groups.

activities.name: Spider-Man Tag
activities.summary: All children dribble; Spider-Man throws a rolled-up bib 'web' to hit footballs. Ball-mastery challenge on re-entry.
